---
title: "Presentations"
---

## Research Talks

| Date | Event | Title |
|------|-------|-------|
| 2025-06 | PKU-Yale Conference | Sociotechnical Perspective on AI in Healthcare |
| 2025-06 | ADRI Panel | Sustainable AI in Primary Care |
| 2025-06 | Internal | RLEF Synthetic Data |
| 2024 | BIE | Strategic Discussion |
| 2026-03 | REAP Conference, Leuven | Heterogeneous Treatment Effects in Early Childhood |

## Teaching

See the [HPM 883 course website](https://hpm883-spring2026.netlify.app/) for lecture slides.

## Business

Business presentations are available on request.
